strengths: ~17 years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Track record of founding GISCollective and delivering platforms end-to-end, plus teaching/workshop experience
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership, published AI products, or recognized AI expertise expected at Principal level
No evidence of director-level IC scope: advising strategic customers, shaping cloud product strategy, or org-wide technical influence
Cloud depth is limited (AWS CDK at Optilyz, Kubernetes for GISCollective); no deep multi-cloud or AI-platform architecture signal

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and built AI products

response.justification: The role requires recognized AI expertise with shipped AI products, director-level IC strategic influence, and deep cloud fluency. The résumé shows ~17 years of solid full-stack engineering and recent MCP/agent tooling work at re:cinq, which partially addresses AI fluency but falls well short of 'recognized expertise' or demonstrated AI platforms. Cloud experience is present but narrow (AWS CDK, Kubernetes self-hosting) rather than strategic. There is no evidence of advising strategic customers, shaping future-state cloud products, or operating at Principal/Director IC scope. Title progression caps at Staff/Senior, and AI work appears recent and contributory rather than leading.
